title: Smoky Chicken Tinga Tacos
description: Tinga is a traditional Mexican dish made with shredded chicken cooked in a smoky chipotle tomato sauce.

ingredients.name: Xtra-smoky chipotle peppers in adobo sauce

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chipotle peppers and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, chicken broth, and tinga seasoning blend. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 10-12 minutes.
Shred the chicken with two forks and stir to combine with the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the tinga chicken onto a tortilla and serving with your desired toppings.
